name: Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang (Novotel Nha Trang Hotel)
address: 50 Trần Phú, Lộc Thọ, Nha Trang, Việt Nam
description:
Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang - Khám phá nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang là một khách sạn 4.0 sao tọa lạc tại thành phố biển Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với vị trí thuận lợi và tiện nghi hiện đại, khách sạn này là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố này.

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang có tổng cộng 154 phòng, được xây dựng từ năm 2008. Với thiết kế sang trọng và tiện nghi hiện đại, mỗi phòng đều mang đến cho du khách sự thoải mái và yên tĩnh sau một ngày dạo chơi và khám phá. Du khách cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian tuyệt vời từ các phòng ở đây, với cảnh quan hướng biển hoặc thành phố tuyệt đẹp.

Việc nhận phòng tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang được thực hiện từ 02:00 PM, và thời gian trả phòng là trước 12:00 PM. Với vị trí gần sân bay chỉ cách khách sạn 45 phút đi xe, du khách dễ dàng di chuyển và tiếp tục hành trình của mình. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng nằm gần trung tâm thành phố chỉ cách 0.2 Km, giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan, nhà hàng và cửa hàng mua sắm.

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cũng rất chào đón gia đình đi du lịch với trẻ em. Khách sạn cho phép trẻ em từ 3 đến 15 tuổi ở miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình muốn khám phá thành phố cùng nhau. Với dịch vụ chất lượng và tiện nghi hiện đại, Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang là sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho mọi du khách đến Nha Trang.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời. Khách sạn có một quầy bar thoải mái, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức những loại đồ uống phong phú và hương vị độc đáo. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một salon và spa chuyên nghiệp, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng các liệu pháp massage thư giãn và làm đẹp. 

Đối với những ai muốn thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể, khách sạn cung cấp các tiện nghi như phòng xông hơi, phòng xông hơi ướt và phòng xông hơi khô. Du khách cũng có thể truy cập vào khu vực chung với TV và ghế sofa để thư giãn và xem các chương trình giải trí. Nếu bạn muốn mua những món quà đặc biệt, hãy ghé qua cửa hàng quà lưu niệm của khách sạn để tìm những món đồ độc đáo và ý nghĩa. Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cam kết mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm giải trí đáng nhớ và thú vị.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại thành phố biển Nha Trang, Việt Nam, và mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi thể thao tuyệt vời. Với một trung tâm thể dục hiện đại, bạn có thể duy trì lối sống lành mạnh trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại đây. Trung tâm thể dục miễn phí được trang bị các thiết bị tập luyện tiên tiến, giúp bạn rèn luyện cơ bắp và nâng cao sức khỏe. 

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một bể bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Bể bơi được thiết kế đẹp mắt và được bao quanh bởi các ghế nằm thoải mái, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng cho việc nghỉ ngơi và tắm nắng. Đặc biệt, có một quầy bar bên bể bơi, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các đồ uống mát lạnh và cocktail tuyệt vời. 

Nếu bạn muốn khám phá bãi biển tuyệt đẹp của Nha Trang, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón miễn phí tới bãi biển. Hãy tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và tận hưởng những hoạt động thể thao ngoài trời tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang.

Tiện nghi tiện ích tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện ích để tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện lợi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp du khách có thể tận hưởng ẩm thực ngon lành ngay tại phòng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt ủi, đảm bảo quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. Du khách cũng có thể yên tâm với hệ thống hòm an toàn để bảo vệ tài sản cá nhân. 

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang còn có đội ngũ nhân viên lễ tân chuyên nghiệp, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ du khách trong mọi nhu cầu. Wi-Fi miễn phí được cung cấp tại các khu vực chung, giúp du khách luôn kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. Nếu du khách muốn hút thuốc, khách sạn cũng có khu vực riêng dành cho hút thuốc. Các dịch vụ khác bao gồm giặt khô, check-in/check-out nhanh chóng, lưu trữ hành lý và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Dịch vụ chuyển đến sân bay giúp du khách tiện lợi và nhanh chóng đến và rời khách sạn. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt tour du lịch, giúp khách hàng khám phá những điểm đến thú vị trong thành phố Nha Trang.

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cũng có bãi đỗ xe, giúp khách hàng tự lái xe đến và từ khách sạn một cách dễ dàng. Nếu khách hàng không muốn tự lái, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí. Nếu muốn thuê xe riêng, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ cho thuê xe. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt vé và dịch vụ taxi, giúp khách hàng tiện lợi khi di chuyển trong thành phố. Bãi đỗ xe tại khách sạn cũng được cung cấp miễn phí và có tính phí cho việc đậu xe.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi phòng hiện đại và đáng mong đợi. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị máy lạnh để du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian thoải mái và mát mẻ. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng cung cấp áo choàng tắm tiện lợi và tiện ích, giúp du khách thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi. 

Đối với những du khách yêu thích điện ảnh, Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cung cấp dịch vụ xem phim trong phòng, đảm bảo rằng bạn sẽ không bao giờ buồn chán. Bạn cũng sẽ không phải lo lắng về việc làm tóc khi lưu trú tại đây, vì mỗi phòng đều được trang bị máy sấy tóc tiện dụng. Ngoài ra, truyền hình và tủ lạnh mini cũng được cung cấp trong phòng, giúp bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng những thức uống mát lạnh. Cuối cùng, mỗi phòng đều có ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng, nơi bạn có thể ngắm cảnh và thư giãn sau một ngày khám phá thành phố.

Những tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, du khách có thể tận hưởng những món ăn ngon ngọt và đa dạng ngay trong phòng nghỉ của mình. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có nhà hàng sang trọng, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc biệt và hương vị độc đáo. Dịch vụ phòng cũng được cung cấp 24 giờ, đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ luôn được phục vụ tận tâm và chuyên nghiệp. Nếu du khách muốn tự nấu ăn, Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cũng cung cấp tiện nghi nhà bếp chung, giúp du khách tận hưởng những bữa ăn tự nấu tại chính căn phòng của mình. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, đảm bảo rằng mọi không gian ở khách sạn luôn sạch sẽ và thoáng mát. Để bắt đầu một ngày mới, du khách có thể tham gia vào buổi sáng với bữa sáng kiểu buffet hoặc bữa sáng kiểu lục địa, với nhiều món ăn đa dạng và thực đơn phong phú.

Các loại phòng tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu của họ. Các loại phòng bao gồm Deluxe King Room với diện tích 58 mét vuông, Executive 1 King Bed với diện tích 42 mét vuông, Executive 2 Single Beds với diện tích 42 mét vuông, Junior Suite với 1 giường King-Size và tầm nhìn ra biển, Standard - King Bed với diện tích 36 mét vuông, Standard Twin Room với diện tích 36 mét vuông, Superior 2 Single Beds với diện tích 36 mét vuông, Superior King Ocean View với diện tích 42 mét vuông, Superior King Room với diện tích 36 mét vuông, và Superior Twin Ocean View với diện tích 42 mét vuông.

Đặt phòng tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang thông qua Agoda mang lại nhiều lợi ích cho du khách. Agoda cam kết cung cấp giá tốt nhất cho các loại phòng này, giúp du khách tiết kiệm chi phí. Đồng thời, việc đặt phòng qua Agoda cũng đảm bảo trải nghiệm đơn giản và không gặp rắc rối, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong quá trình đặt phòng.

Khám phá vùng Lộc Thọ tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam

Lộc Thọ, một khu vực nổi tiếng tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và đáng nhớ. Với vị trí thuận lợi, chỉ cách Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang vài bước chân, du khách có thể dễ dàng truy cập đến các điểm tham quan và hoạt động giải trí phong phú trong khu vực này.

Lộc Thọ nổi tiếng với bãi biển tuyệt đẹp, cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Du khách có thể thả mình vào làn nước mát lạnh, tắm nắng trên bãi biển hoặc thực hiện các hoạt động thể thao nước như lướt ván, lặn biển và đi xe trượt nước. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều nhà hàng, quán cà phê và các cửa hàng mua sắm, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đặc sản độc đáo và trải nghiệm văn hóa độc đáo của Nha Trang.

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang là điểm dừng chân lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vùng Lộc Thọ. Với các tiện nghi hiện đại, phòng nghỉ sang trọng và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, khách sạn này sẽ mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Dù bạn đang tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ thư giãn hay muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên và văn hóa độc đáo của Nha Trang, Lộc Thọ là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua.

Hướng dẫn đến Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang từ sân bay gần nhất

Để đến Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang từ các sân bay gần Nha Trang, bạn có một số lựa chọn vận chuyển thuận tiện và dễ dàng.

Sân bay quốc tế Cam Ranh là sân bay lân cận nhất với Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang. Từ sân bay này, bạn có thể di chuyển bằng taxi hoặc dịch vụ xe đưa đón. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay Cam Ranh đến khách sạn khoảng 40 phút. Để tiết kiệm thời gian và tránh bất tiện, bạn có thể đặt trước dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay tại quầy thông tin hoặc trực tuyến qua trang web của khách sạn.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể chọn di chuyển bằng xe buýt từ sân bay Cam Ranh đến trung tâm thành phố Nha Trang, sau đó di chuyển từ trung tâm thành phố đến Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang bằng taxi hoặc xe đạp. Điều này có thể mất thêm thời gian, nhưng sẽ là một cách tiết kiệm chi phí vận chuyển.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc gần nhiều điểm đến nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị khi khám phá Nha Trang. Với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận Biển Nha Trang - một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất Việt Nam, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng ánh nắng vàng rực rỡ cùng những cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp.

Ngoài ra, Central Park cũng nằm gần khách sạn, là một không gian xanh thoáng đãng, lý tưởng để tản bộ và thư giãn. Du khách có thể thưởng thức không khí trong lành và ngắm nhìn những khu vườn hoa tươi tắn tại đây. Đối diện với khách sạn là Phòng tranh Mai Lộc, một nơi trưng bày những tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo và sáng tạo, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm văn hóa độc đáo.

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang cũng nằm gần Story Beach & Pool, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức không gian biển tuyệt đẹp và tham gia các hoạt động nước thú vị. Ngoài ra, Nhà thờ giáo xứ Thánh Giuse và Nhà thờ Bắc Thành là những điểm đến tôn giáo quan trọng, nơi du khách có thể khám phá nét đẹp kiến trúc và tìm hiểu về lịch sử văn hóa địa phương.

Đối với những du khách quan tâm đến y tế, Bệnh viện quân y và Bệnh Viện Đa Khoa Tỉnh Khánh Hòa cũng nằm gần khách sạn, đảm bảo sự tiện lợi và an tâm trong việc chăm sóc sức khỏe. Trung tâm thông tin tiếng Nga cũng nằm trong phạm vi gần, hỗ trợ du khách nước ngoài trong việc tìm hiểu và khám phá Nha Trang.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang có vị trí thuận lợi, nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng. Bạn có thể tận hưởng ẩm thực phong phú tại Sailing Club Nha Trang, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn địa phương và hòa mình vào không khí vui tươi. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức pizza ngon, hãy ghé thăm Pizza 4P's Nha Trang. Skylight Nha Trang là một địa điểm tuyệt vời để thưởng thức cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp của thành phố và thưởng thức các món ăn đa dạng. Louisiane Brewhouse là một nhà hàng bãi biển nổi tiếng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn Âu và hương vị bia độc đáo. Mix Greek Restaurant là lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực Hy Lạp, với các món ăn truyền thống và không gian sang trọng. Quinter Central Nha Trang là một nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn Việt Nam và quốc tế, mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng. Chuon Chuon Kim Restaurant là một nhà hàng nổi tiếng với các món ăn đặc sản Việt Nam. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức cà phê độc đáo, hãy ghé thăm Iced Coffee Simply Original. Greek Souvlaki Nha Trang là một nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn Hy Lạp truyền thống. Ngon Gallery Nha Trang Restaurant là một địa điểm tuyệt vời để thưởng thức các món ăn Việt Nam và quốc tế.

Những điểm mua sắm xung quanh Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm hấp dẫn. Bạn có thể dạo chơi tại Nhà may Hội An để khám phá những trang phục truyền thống độc đáo. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức trà thảo mộc tinh túy, hãy ghé qua Phòng trà Chính Nguyên Xuyên. Cửa hàng Amart là nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy các sản phẩm độc đáo và sáng tạo. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm vật lý trị liệu thư giãn, bãi biển Nha Trang là địa điểm lý tưởng. Đừng quên ghé qua Da cá sấu Anh Thư để tìm những sản phẩm từ da cá sấu chất lượng. Nếu bạn muốn mua những chiếc áo thun vẽ tay độc đáo, hãy đến cửa hàng Áo thun vẽ tay Kim Quang. Bạn cũng có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại nhà hàng bia Tiệp Hoàng Gia. Nếu bạn quan tâm đến nghệ thuật thêu lụa, hãy đến Tranh thêu lụa XQ để khám phá những tác phẩm tuyệt đẹp. Trung tâm lặn biển Rainbow Divers là nơi bạn có thể trải nghiệm những hoạt động lặn biển thú vị. Cuối cùng, Trung tâm Nha Trang là nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy nhiều cửa hàng, quầy hàng và nhà hàng đa dạng. Với vị trí thuận lợi gần những điểm mua sắm này, Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang sẽ mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm mua sắm tuyệt vời.

Giá trung bình phòng tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang so với giá trung bình phòng ở thành phố cùng loại

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang tọa lạc tại thành phố Nha Trang, Việt Nam, với giá trung bình phòng là $69. Đây là một mức giá hợp lý cho một khách sạn cao cấp như Novotel với các tiện ích và dịch vụ đẳng cấp. So với giá trung bình phòng ở Nha Trang là $67, giá của Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang chỉ cao hơn một chút. Tuy nhiên, sự chênh lệch này đáng kể bởi Novotel Nha Trang mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm đáng giá với không gian sang trọng, phòng ốc thoải mái và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp.

Phục vụ tuyệt vời và nhân viên thân thiện tại Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng về dịch vụ tuyệt vời và sự phục vụ đáng khen. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và hỗ trợ đã tạo nên một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời cho khách hàng. Khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao về bữa sáng ngon lành. Phòng rộng rãi với các tiện nghi tuyệt vời và giường ngủ thoải mái. Không chỉ vậy, khách sạn còn có tầm nhìn hoàn hảo ra biển. Một số khách hàng còn nhấn mạnh về sự thân thiện và hỗ trợ của đội ngũ nhân viên. Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một nơi lưu trú tại Nha Trang, chúng tôi rất khuyến khích bạn chọn Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang.

Đánh giá tích cực về Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang

Khách sạn Novotel Nha Trang là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những du khách muốn tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với đánh giá tổng thể ấn tượng 8.9, khách sạn này đã chứng tỏ sự đáng giá vượt trội của mình. Với điểm số 8.7 cho giá trị, Novotel Nha Trang mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với mức giá hợp lý.

Với các tiện nghi đạt điểm số 8.5, khách sạn này đáp ứng tốt nhu cầu của du khách. Bạn sẽ tìm thấy một hồ bơi ngoài trời, trung tâm thể dục hiện đại và spa sang trọng để thư giãn và thưởng thức. Với điểm số 8.1 cho ẩm thực, khách sạn cung cấp các món ăn ngon miệng và đa dạng để khách hàng có thể thỏa sức khám phá ẩm thực độc đáo của Nha Trang.

Đánh giá về sự sạch sẽ của khách sạn đạt điểm số 9.2, cho thấy sự chú trọng và quan tâm của nhân viên đối với vệ sinh. Vị trí khách sạn được đánh giá cao với điểm số 9.4, gần các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng như Bãi biển Trần Phú và Tháp Bà Ponagar. Với điểm số 9.0 cho sự thoải mái và 9.1 cho hiệu suất nhân viên, Novotel Nha Trang cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm lưu trú tuyệt vời và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp.

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã đặt phòng với bạn bè và bạn tôi đã nói rằng phòng rất đẹp, đến mức suốt thời gian ở lại chúng tôi đều bàn về điều đó. Đây là phòng Twin có view đại dương, tình trạng phòng rất tốt, và biển nhìn như ở ngay trước mắt tôi. Ban công cũng rất rộng, thật tuyệt khi ra ngoài vào ban đêm để ăn vặt. Ban ngày thì hơi nóng nhưng có bóng râm nên nếu không bị say nắng, bạn có thể ra ngoài ngắm cảnh cũng rất tuyệt. Nhân viên quầy lễ tân rất thân thiện, khi check-in, nhân viên đã kéo valy giúp tôi và cùng đi thang máy lên phòng. Tiện nghi rất đầy đủ, và phòng tắm cũng đặc biệt có thể ngâm chân, vì vậy cuối cùng chúng tôi đã ăn sáng và ngâm chân. Tôi đã ở lại 2 đêm và hoàn toàn hài lòng. Nếu lần sau đến Nha Trang, tôi sẽ quay lại đây.
sample_comments.title: Nếu lại đến Nha Trang, tôi sẽ quay lại đây.
Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Vị trí , nhân viên, tiện nghi , sạch sẽ, chỗ để oto
sample_comments.negatives: Ăn sáng có cơm tấm ngon, còn lại ko ấn tượng lắm

sample_comments.text:
Đây là khách sạn tốt nhất mà tôi đã ở tại Nha Trang. Không chỉ là một trong những khách sạn tốt nhất mà thực sự là TỐT NHẤT. Có thể nó không phải là khách sạn sang trọng nhất nhưng về hiệu suất chi phí, hiệu quả, sự tiện lợi, tôi có thể nói rằng nó đạt điểm 10/10. Từ giây phút chúng tôi đến, chúng tôi đã cảm thấy rất được chào đón. Phòng rộng rãi và sạch sẽ. Cảnh biển từ cửa sổ và ban công thật tuyệt vời. Cảnh quan đẹp mê hồn suốt cả ngày. Nó nằm ở trung tâm Nha Trang. Bạn sẽ tìm thấy nơi đổi tiền với tỉ giá tốt nhất, cả những nơi ăn uống địa phương và cho khách du lịch suốt cả ngày, các cửa hàng, cửa hàng tiện lợi, spa/massage đều trong khoảng cách đi bộ. Có phòng gym, hồ bơi, sauna ở tầng 3. Nhà hàng và quầy bar cũng rất đẹp. Chắc chắn tôi sẽ quay lại!!
Cảm ơn vì tất cả những dịch vụ, sự chăm sóc và nụ cười thân thiện đã làm tôi cảm thấy như ở nhà.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn tốt nhất ở Nha Trang!!
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Khách sạn có từ lâu nhưng mọi thứ nhìn như mới, sạch sẽ, drap, khăn tắm trắng tươi, nhân vui vẻ, nhiệt tình. Ngay gần tháp trầm hương, chợ đêm, quán bar, cà phê ( Sailing club, Chốn bình yên, Bốn mùa...), băng qua đường là có thể tắm biển, đi dạo biển, ngắm bình minh... nên rất tiện lợi. Nhóm mình đi vào dịp tết còn được nâng cấp phòng miễn phí

sample_comments.text: Bữa sáng không tệ lắm và phòng sạch sẽ. Tôi đã ở phòng có tầm nhìn ra biển, tầm nhìn đẹp nhưng buổi sáng ánh nắng mạnh nên cần phải kéo rèm chắn sáng. Nhân viên ở mức độ trung bình và các tiện nghi không tệ.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn tốt với giá cả hợp lý
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Phòng đẹp, rộng, view đẹp, đáng tiền
sample_comments.negatives: Chổ ăn sáng hơi chật

sample_comments.text: Vị trí tuyệt vời, chỗ ở rất sạch sẽ, và nhân viên phục vụ rất thân thiện. Kích thước phòng cũng rộng rãi, Wi-Fi và nước nóng được cung cấp mà không gặp vấn đề gì, giúp tôi có khoảng thời gian thoải mái. Các tiện ích đi kèm được trang bị đầy đủ, tạo nên một trải nghiệm hài lòng, và giá cả cũng rất hợp lý. Tổng thể, đây là một địa điểm đáng để giới thiệu.

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money
sample_comments.positives: The room has good soundproofing, and the bed is comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives:
There were two things I disliked most about Novotel:

1. Terrible food: After checking in and while waiting until 2:00 PM for my room, I ate at the restaurant on the first floor. It was the worst pizza and sandwich I've ever had. The pizza crust was made from frozen dough and was rock hard; the sandwich was also tough, and the ingredients lacked flavor. I forgot to take a photo, but honestly, fast-food chains like Pizza Hut taste better. Considering how common high-quality Italian pizza, wood-fired pizza, or 4P's pizza is in Vietnam now, it's shocking that a chef at a 4-star hotel would serve such poor quality. This was the first thing that ruined my mood.

2. Lack of communication regarding beach services: Upon check-in, the receptionists failed to mention that the sunloungers on the beach in front of the hotel are only free from 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM.
When I went down to the beach at 4:05 PM, I saw umbrellas with the hotel logo and intended to sit down. A man approached me and rudely asked, 'How many chairs?' Thinking he was hotel staff, I said I needed two. He told me it would be 200k VND for two chairs; otherwise, I couldn't sit there.

Goodness, I felt like I was back in Vung Tau 20 years ago!!!!! I paid 3.5 million VND for a one-night stay mid-tour. It's not that I can't afford extra for services, but the experience was bizarre and talking to that man completely soured my mood.

If the hotel wants to provide loungers for guests, they should cover the cost for the entire day. If they can't do that, they should just remove the chairs entirely.

Under no circumstances should you book at this hotel

sample_comments.title: Overall, it's conveniently located for exploring the city, and the staff is friendly.
sample_comments.positives: The room has a great ocean view, and both the room and bathtub are spacious. After breakfast, the turn-down service is prompt, and the staff is friendly.
sample_comments.negatives: We tried the dinner buffet, but there weren't many food options, and the freshness was somewhat lacking. Also, the swimming pool is small, and outside food is not allowed.

sample_comments.title: I didn't expect this level from Novotel.
sample_comments.text: I didn't expect it to be like this even though it's old. I thought it would just be a place to drop off my bags since my flight to Nha Trang was at night, but even so, the shower facilities are outdated and there's a gap in the floor. The bathroom and all the amenities in the room are worse than a motel level... I ran out of the room immediately. Even though it's old, for those of us who prefer cleanliness, it might feel a bit unsanitary. The corridor doesn't have air conditioning, and when lifting a suitcase into the room, there's a threshold at the door to get over. All the hotels in downtown Nha Trang are old, so there's nothing that can be done about that, but since I've only been at new accommodations, I might have felt it even more. The only good thing is the location. It's okay for those looking for cost-effectiveness, but it's best not to expect too much just because it's called Novotel or is a hotel.
sample_comments.response:
고객님께,

안녕하세요. 노보텔 나트랑입니다.
먼저 저희 호텔을 찾아주신 점 진심으로 감사드리며, 기대에 미치지 못한 서비스로 불편을 드린 점 깊이 사과드립니다.

노보텔 나트랑은 아코르 그룹의 일원으로서, 고객님께 최상의 서비스를 제공하기 위해 항상 국제 기준에 부합하는 시설과 청결, 친절한 서비스를 유지하고자 최선을 다하고 있습니다. 그럼에도 불구하고 고객님의 소중한 기대에 미치지 못한 점을 매우 안타깝게 생각하며, 지적해주신 내용은 관련 부서와 공유하여 빠르게 개선해 나가겠습니다.

말씀해 주신 객실 시설 및 비품 상태, 복도 환경 등은 현재 순차적으로 리노베이션 계획이 진행 중이며, 고객님께서 더 쾌적하게 이용하실 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

고객님의 솔직한 의견은 저희에게 큰 도움이 되었으며, 다음 번 방문 시에는 보다 나은 모습으로 만족을 드릴 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.

다시 한번 불편을 드린 점 진심으로 사과드리며, 소중한 시간을 내어 의견을 공유해주셔서 감사합니다.

감사합니다.
노보텔 나트랑 고객 서비스팀 드림

sample_comments.title: Quite disappointed with the qualities
sample_comments.text: I booked king size bed which I did expect the real king size one, but apparently I got 2 single mattresses put together which light switch and plugs are in between those 2 mattresses (I couldn't find it for my first night because it was hidden from pillows, meaning I was sleeping on it). Food quality was also quite disappointed, expected much better croissant (it was just bread that looked like croissant), when I asked a staff about the coffee machine, she didn't even look at me and without any word but shouted to another staff to take care of me which was so rude of her. I tried buffet dinner, quality of food could be improved. I booked car to airport a night in advance, and they were 10 mins late and excused for bad traffic. I stayed at Ibis for my first 3 nights and Novotel for another 3 nights, I would say Ibis was much better in terms of staffs (both service mind and English level), quality of food especially breakfast, and bed which ibis gave me real king size mattress.

sample_comments.title: Didn't live up to other reviews / expectations
sample_comments.text:
This hotel was a let down for us.
* the pool was tiny and was east facing, therefore, never in the sun. Anyway the hotel closed it for maintenance when we were there.
* the sunbathing area was over the main drag which was exceedingly busy, on the beach. We were told that the Government dictated how many sun beds the hotel could have - 24 sun beds - for 180 rooms. Informed at check in that we could use hotel towels on other beach beds but would have to pay a nominal fee.
* there is a lot of construction work and building taking place next door and at the back of the hotel, so together with the traffic, the noise level was very high..
* the free wi-fi was sporadic
* the hotel front faces the beach but our balcony only had sun for 2 hours in the morning, in addition a metal grill ran up the left inside from the floor to the ceiling, approx a third of the way over, obscuring the view. This was cosmetic.
More positively
* the rooms themselves were clean, the hotel is only a few years old, although there is not much storage space
* the staff are very friendly
* the restaurant was very nice, bright and the food was well layed out.
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staff

sample_comments.text: overall, good hotel in terms of clean, well-sized rooms with lovely balcony and views in every room. inconsistent service means staff is poorly trained to address standards typical of other hotels in its price range. had to call several times to make sure rooms were cleaned before 4pm. there's really no private beach area or enough lounge chairs - this is deceiving from their website. end up getting charged for lounge chairs for a whole day - whether you use it for one hour or 8hours. poor food quality and reception desks and restaurant service (in room and in the restaurant) is mediocre. got charged higher prices for return trip to airport - just because we didnt book it at the same time as pickup. receptionist just gives you the run-around and redirects you to the travel agent in the lobby. finally - you have to raise to upper management to get it resolved correctly - as the reception staff is typically ill-trained in vietnam. same with room service - they dont put someone who can understand english or speak english well; which seems vital if you are ordering room service generally over the phone. some rooms have showers some rooms have baths - you need to specify during check-in, because they just dont tell you.

To make the delivery smoothly, we have attempted to arrange the courier service by ourselves and asked the courier come to the hotel to pick it up. However, the staff was very un-respectful. sample_comments.title: Not as expected
sample_comments.text:
The stay was relatively disappointing, especially after having read mostly fantastic reviews about the hotel, which led me to believe the hotel was the best choice for my 3 night stay in Nha Trang over Christmas.
Booked a Deluxe King room. Checked in around 230pm only for reception to tell me that they assigned a 6th floor room (total 18 floors) to me. Requested for a higher floor and was told that the hotel was pretty full and there were no more rooms. After a couple of disappointed remarks, a room suddenly was available on the 15th floor. Ok, fine...
In the room, everything looked great, then came the finer details.. The sunken in 'bathtub' looked dirty and not properly maintained. Wifi was weak and intermittent. The worse thing was that the hot water in the shower only lasted for a short time and the staff said they had to boil water?? to keep it hot??? So we had to wait for 15 minutes. And therefore the 'bathtub' was impractical and unuseable. Unbelievable.
Breakfast was ok. Few varieties and the same food everyday. But acceptable. What was unacceptable was that the staff cleaned and prepared a table for us, but I found that the fork they placed for me was used, unwashed and filled with food particles. Seriously?!
Most staff had lukewarm attitudes in my opinion, but they weren't unfriendly, impolite or anything to that extent. Just not what I expected.
Aside from the negatives, the hotel was pretty centrally located along the beach front with easy access to many restaurants. It also had a section of the beach closed off for its guests which was a good idea.
After reading so many 'amazing' reviews about this hotel, I was honestly disappointed with my stay. Perhaps it was an isolated incident, I wouldn't know. But I would probably try the Sheraton or Sunrise hotels if I were to go back to Nha Trang.
sample_comments.positives: Location, large room, ocean view

sample_comments.title: Started good, but ended bad
sample_comments.text:
Hello,

We stayed here for one night in Nha Trang and the staff was very welcoming to start with and stated that they upgraded our room to one of their bigger and nicest rooms; however, around 5pm there was very loud drilling for approximately one hour coming from just outside the bathroom on the exterior of the building and then again at 7am which woke us up and was very unpleasant. When we checked out we explained this to the manager and he stated that they have workers to stop the rain from getting into the room during this time of year. The manager then argued with us about the times we heard the drilling and said his staff would not have started that early. The manager did not offer us any sort of discount or anything at all for the inconvenience. Very displeased with the service from the manager. Do not recommend staying at this hotel. We stayed 3 nights and the Sheraton down the road for only 50 bucks Canadian more a night and it was so much better.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Gurminder,
Dear Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. I'm truly sorry to hear about the issues you experienced during your stay, especially the disruption from the drilling noise. I understand how unsettling this must have been, and I apologize for the inconvenience it caused.

Regarding the noise and your interaction with the manager, I regret that we did not meet your expectations in addressing these concerns. We appreciate your comments and will use them to review and improve our service and communication.

We strive to provide a comfortable and pleasant experience for all our guests, and I'm sorry we fell short in this instance. If there's anything else we can do to address your concerns or if you have further feedback, please feel free to contact us directly.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Guest service team,

My family(6 adults and 3 children) began our one week Nha Trang trip at Novotel Hotel, but my baby boy got a deep cut on his left foot in the hotel swimming pool the first day we checked in . Though the hotel sent he to a hospital and payed for the medical treatment, but it did ruined our trip. I had to hug the little boy everywhere we went to, we canceled most of our activity outside and no more playing in water. 
Any way, thanks for Anna's kindly help. Wish Novotel Hotel can check the swing pool carefully and don't let this kind of issue happen again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Zhiyan,
We do apologize for the bad experience happening during your stay at the hotel. We closed our pool for urgent maintenance and renovation for your information. We would like to send our best wishes to your son and hope he will get better soon. Your thanks will also be passed on to Anna. Thank you for sharing your feedback and we hope for another chance to regain your trust and bring you good time in near future.
Kind regards,
Remi Faubel - General Manager

sample_comments.title: The location is good.
sample_comments.text: The location is not bad. I was worried about checking in late, but I felt their kindness with a quick response. The accommodation provided a basic bed in a bunk bed room, which seems good for families with more than two kids or for friends to use it at a cheaper rate of 0.5. However, when I first entered, there was a musty smell and the toilet hadn't been cleaned for a long time, making it feel a bit dirty. If this issue is improved, it could be an even better hotel. Still, due to the good price, the location, the included breakfast, and the kindness I felt from most of the staff, it's a great choice if you're staying in downtown Nha Trang.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We're glad to hear that you appreciated our convenient location, quick responses during your late check-in, and the room setup that suited your family. It's wonderful to know that our team's friendliness made a positive impression on your stay.

However, we sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered with the room's cleanliness. Your comments regarding the musty smell and the condition of the bathroom are concerning, and we will address these matters with our housekeeping team to ensure improvements are made.

We appreciate your understanding and are grateful for your suggestions. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide an even better experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Guest Service Team
Novotel Nha Trang

- Персонал достаточно приветлив и отзывчив --- решил все возникающие неудобства 
- Номер был достаточно чистым и просторным
- Уборка каждый день, как положено
- Высокие потолки и просторная ванная комната
- Зона, где стоит унитаз --- визуально закрыта от комнаты
- Симпатичный просторный балкон с хорошим видом
- Кондиционер работал исправно
- Воду приносили каждый день
- В ресторане можно заказать омлет на завтрак
- Есть своя небольшая бесплатная зона с лежаками на пляже
sample_comments.negatives:
- Ремонт в отеле доставлял дискомфорт, понимаю, что это временно, но при бронировании вас никто не предупредит. Лучше уточните перед бронью
- Чувствуется, что номера и мебель старые, при въезде присутствовал запах
- Чтобы открыть дверь в номер нужно приложить усилие, чтобы закрыть приходится хлопать
- Напротив лифтов на этажах есть открытое пространство с низкими перилами, выглядит небезопасно
- Никаких приветственных фруктов/конфет не предложили, видимо так делают только для «статусных» гостей
- Собственная зона на пляже всего на 5 зонтиков и находится на второй линии, сотрудники на пляже дымят сигаретами и доставляют дискомфорт
- Выбор еды на завтраке больше заточен под азиатских гостей, мало что выбрать западному гостю
- Шум с дороги присутствует, спать не сильно мешал

sample_comments.title: Overpriced hotel on a good location
sample_comments.text: We found this hotel overpriced for what it has to offer. We got a good rate with Agoda but when you walk in you pay 3 times our price. It's definitely not worth this extreme high walk-in price. Our superior room on the 16th floor had a good full seaview. The room was large and comfortable. But the room had a connecting door which was not soundproof so we heard all the noice from our neighbours. The white carpet in the room had a lot of dirty stains which made the room look worn down. One day we had no Wifi in the room at all. This was a big miss for the price they ask. Even $10 hotels offer good working Wifi in the rooms. Like all Novotel's the put a lot of drinks and food in the room. They ask a extreme high price for this. On the positive side the breakfast was very good with a lot of western food and good quality.
sample_comments.positives: Large rooms with good view over the ocean

sample_comments.title: Great views, poor service
sample_comments.text:
We chose to stay here in part because they had a relatively large, modern gym and pool on the first floor. The pool was a bit small and shallow, but the gym was nice. However, although it was supposed to open at 6 am (and we called them to remind them to open it up the night before), in fact it was not opened until 7 am.
The rooms were nice with wonderful views and the breakfast was fine (although not included in the room rate and relatively expensive), but with so many employees they should offer better service. They did find a lost cell phone. They also claim to have "wireless" in the rooms, but in fact there is one cable----which means that two people with laptops must take turns getting Internet access. The lobby has 2 terminals which are nearly always in use, often by children. And, yes, the hotel is full of children and families, probably because of its location.

sample_comments.title: Good service tainted by "Deposit Girl
sample_comments.text:
This hotel is fabulous. They provide just what you can expect from Novotel. This hotel has a privately owned beach yard just 2 minutes away from your room where you can have a relaxed, romantic, peaceful moment enjoying nice food delivered from the hotel. 

Despite of all these good things, however, my holidays were not that pleasant simply because of one insolent reception .. In check-in time this asked me to deposit some money for mini-bar saying it's a hotel policy. I used to stay in Novotel many times in different cities, but never heard about or experienced with such thing. Obviously this bitch much worried that I will runaway without paying for the pepsi in the fridge. I asked her to show me any such policy in written form. She mumbled with no confidence anymore and said she cannot find it right now.

 I'm not going to use this hotel again no matter how good facilities they have.

sample_comments.title: Good hotel, spacious rooms, OK service
sample_comments.text:
as my second stay at novotel nha trang, i have to say that this time it met all my expectations despite being a bit lacking on the service side. i got upsold at check-in on an ocean view room for an extra per night, but it was well worth it. rooms are large and spacious, washrooms are excellent (only complaint was that the hot water wasn't as hot as i prefer but then again i prefer it scalding hot!).

service was decent but not as good as it used to be. concierge / bellboys weren't as prompt as they should be. found myself waving down a taxi on multiple occasions. 

only minor complaint i have which i'm sitting on the fence about is their treatment of 'locals'. my friend had a room booked and was checked in but they would be questioned almost everytime they entered the lobby. just because you may look like a local doesn't mean they're not staying in the hotel and have to be questioned everytime you enter / exit the lobby area!

We experienced a confrontation when the beach staff sat us in the shade of an umbrella & returning guests accused us of stealing their shade 2 hours later.

sample_comments.title: Great Location!
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located right by the beach, just cross the road for public beach access. While checking in, it might be worth asking for an upgrade (our room was not ready when we arrived and they upgraded us to the a better room - higher up, bigger room). Most rooms have a balcony, with great views on the coastline. About 5 mins walk to the main nightlife, restaurants, shops, etc. They also have a tour desk, to book snorkeling, diving or other tours - prices are ok but worth checking with diving and tour shops in the area. Bike rental also available (again, check outside for better deals). Gym is average size, steam room and sauna good but setting is average (changing room, showers and steam room/sauna all in one room). Free internet is available in the lobby, but there are only two computers - sometimes you have to wait a long time for other people to finish browsing and playing games. The night staff is not very helpful, impossible to speak to anyone (staff was refusing to speak English, not a 4star hotel standard).
sample_comments.positives: Close to nightlife, restaurants and diving shops. Clean, comfortable, spacious rooms, some have a great view on the beach! Offers all basic amenities, plus free internet access, gym, spa, sauna, steam room.
sample_comments.negatives: More a 'business-like' atmosphere, rather than a resort. The swimming pool is tiny!

sample_comments.title: Great Stay
sample_comments.text:
The staff was friendly and nice especially the doorman. Props to the guy, he was amazing. 

The hotel was doing renovation so it was not the prettiest looking once you get to the floor. After walking in, you can tell the room needed renovation but the view was amazing as I was facing the sea. The room was clean, there were some mold in the bathroom and the furnishing was quite old. Breakfast was great but I feel like they keep running out of food. I think they need to get a new coffee machine where the guest can make it themselves as the server need to make the coffee. The viet coffee was not self-serve and had to find a server to make it. 

Towels is available for free for guests heading to the beach and seats with umbrella are available but they are usually packed.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Andy,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us and for choosing Novotel Nha Trang.
We're glad to hear that you had a great stay and appreciated the friendliness of our staff --- especially our doorman, who will be delighted to receive your kind words!

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the ongoing renovation. While we are working to enhance our facilities, we understand that it may affect the visual impression on some floors. Your feedback regarding the room condition and bathroom cleanliness has been shared with our housekeeping and maintenance teams for immediate attention.

We also appreciate your suggestions about breakfast service and the coffee station. We're currently reviewing ways to improve guest convenience, including the possibility of adding a self-service coffee option.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to welcome you back soon for an even better experience.

Warm regards,
Guest Service Team

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
Travel alone and took the airport bus to Nha Trang. The bus stopped near the Citadines. And just within 5 mins walk to Novotel.

I stayed in the standard room. The room view is good. It was clean and lots of space.

Waiting time for check in and check out were acceptable.

The only concern I had was I bought a SIM card and wished to register for the Vietnam taxi app, so I can easily estimate fare and reserve a taxi and no need to deal with the driver on spot.

However, I was not possible to get the OTP (one time password) via SMS, so I seek help from the front staff.

He seems not too understand (I showed him in Vietnamese). The count down used to resend if I cannot receive any SMS. 

The staff kept asking me to wait until it finished and told me it will come at the end. Then, he repeated the step.

I expected local can help but I gave up finally.

sample_comments.title: Overall satisfactory
sample_comments.text: Our special requests could not be met at the beginning but frontdesk staff Mr. GIA was so helpful to fullfill all of them eventually (seaview, high floor and bathtub... even though the bathtub plug was useless :( ). All of the the staff were nice with smiley faces. Pleasant stay in Nha Trang!

It's extremely windy during my stay. The whirling sound managed to sipped through the door gaps resulting in sleepless nights. The big bathroom has a tub which I don't know how it suits the purpose. It's too small to swim and too big to soak in. 
I paid something like usd400 for 3N and the laundry bag and slipper are not even complimentary. 
The bonus: 
Staffs are friendly and warm

sample_comments.title: Nice, centrally located hotel opposite beach
sample_comments.text:
The Novotel was an affordable option right across from the beach, affording great views of the coastline. Staff were attentive though did endlessly drag me around rooms trying to make me upgrade when I'd clearly said my room was fine. Food was nice enough, but restaurants full of screaming children (not really the hotels' fault obviously) so went elsewhere after one meal. Rooms are definitely comfy, well designed (especially the funky bathrooms and soft rugs) and the balconies even in side rooms had a diagonal view of the ocean.

Was not a massive fan of Nha Trang itself as it offers very little atmosphere and is very touristy/resorty rather than the relaxed beach/backpacker vibe I prefer. Huge Russian influence in town and very little Vietnamese feel to the place whatsoever.
sample_comments.positives: Location, comfy room, great view

sample_comments.title: Great location

The only bad point was the very limited number of chairs that they have on the hotel's 'private beach'. Other than that i would highly reccommend it.
sample_comments.positives: Position and the rooms.

sample_comments.title: great beach front hotel
sample_comments.text: My stay was great. I loved my room. Clean and big. The balcony is great - I can feel the beach early in the morning. Great glass window separating my room - even if I am inside my room, I can still feel I am in the arms of the beach. Love the food in the buffet prepared by the one and only restaurant in the Hotel. The only problem I have with this hotel is there very slow elevator.
sample_comments.positives: Beach Front Rooms, very modern and aesthetic, very good service, Hotel staff knows english well

sample_comments.title: Almost Excellent
sample_comments.text: stayed at this property for two nights for a relaxing break. i was impressed with the service,breakfasts were fresh and plentiful. the rooms were modern with adequately comfortable beds and gorgeous views of the ocean.
sample_comments.positives: large balcony overlooking the beach

sample_comments.title: Hotel with modern facilities
sample_comments.text: the quality of the hotel room, and its fittings and furnishings, were of the very highest standards. it is a new hotel and conforms to the best international standards. the view from the beach view sixth floor room was simple breathtaking. the spa was excellent and the service standards at the place were superlative. the quality of the hotel breakfast and the general standards of service, however, were not of the highest standard. the hotel tour desk was limp and unenthusiastic.
sample_comments.positives: Superb location, excellent spa
sample_comments.negatives: staff was too stressed out to give individual attention

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel
sample_comments.text: my family and i had a very pleasant stay. the hotel was confortable and convenient to everything. i would go back there.

sample_comments.negatives: No real cons

sample_comments.title: Friendly smiles goes a long way!

sample_comments.title: Good location
sample_comments.text: This hotel location is perfect right across the beach and centralize in the highlighted area on Nha Trang. The hotel is a bit outdated and the bed was uncomfortable compare with the other newer Novotel we stayed in Da Nang & HCMC. Breakfast was good not spectacular like other raved about. Hotel service overall was great but next time I would stay at one of the newer hotel down the street since I prefer a little bit luxury than what this Novotel.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: Great location, nice swimming pool. Easy to get a taxi and very close to the beach. Breakfast was really high quality.

sample_comments.title: comfortable hotel with good location
sample_comments.text: Relaxing staying with good restaurants around. Great view to the 5km beach.
sample_comments.positives: Good spa, breakfast and private beach

sample_comments.title: Very nice loved it the beach was beautiful.
sample_comments.text: It was great, loved the location, the room was beautiful. Will go back.
sample_comments.positives: Location staff breakfast

sample_comments.title: Great beach hotel
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel, beach just across the road. At least in March the beach was not too crowded. Hotel was clean and room spacious. The hotel staff was very friendly and ready to help with everything without asking.
sample_comments.positives: Right at the beach, friendly staff

sample_comments.title: lovely and relaxing holiday at beach, great room.
sample_comments.text: feel pampered, relaxed and clean hotel.standard room quite big with great view
sample_comments.positives: close to beach, great breakfast, centrally located

sample_comments.title: Excellent hotel and great location
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in Novotel Nha Trang for 3 days and we are totally happy. Arrived at 01:45 and our Standard Room was not ready yet. They offer me and upgrade to Deluxe in level 18. It was worth to upgrade. Room are beautiful and excellent view. Love the bathroom design. Bed are comfortable: we require 1 double bed but actually this is 2 single bed together. But this was not a big deal.

Staff are very friendly: reception, beach service staff, security, etc. Especially beach service staff are super friendly and kind. 

We tried Spa in level 3: spa is free (swimming pool as well) and massage price is a bit high compare to another spa around. They did massage quite well.

Breakfast was very good, lots of choices.

In overall we are happy with Novotel Nha Trang. We will come back next time and strongly recommened
sample_comments.positives: Room are superb: beach view. Great location: semi private beach. Excellent spa/massage

sample_comments.title: Center of Nha Trang
sample_comments.text: Very good stay at the Novotel. The staff were super friendly and any issues we had were quickly dealt with and exceeded my expectations. Beach is just in front of the hotel and lots of local markets and restaurants within walking distance. Airport Transfer from Cam Rah is well worth it.
sample_comments.positives: Best Features of the Novotel are a very attentive staff, central location, and nice rooms with beach view

sample_comments.title: Cosy and good food
sample_comments.text: receptionists are very nice and helpful! The bell ball is excellent that he not only remember your name but also help you to discuss with the taxi driver about the taxi fare! Overall, the service is wonderful
sample_comments.positives: Good service, clean room and center of the city

sample_comments.title: Great hotel with excellent location
sample_comments.text: We had a good stay at the luxurious Novotel. However, the price was a bit steep.
sample_comments.positives: Beach, Breakfast, Large room

sample_comments.title: Worth the stay!
sample_comments.text: Wonderful. It was everything we expected and more. Highly recommend staying here especially for great customer service.
sample_comments.positives: The location, the beach and the staff

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: I had a large room to stay, a big balcony for ocean view, aircond is cool enough. The bathroom are so large and nice. Very clean room. All utilities and stuff are provided by hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Convenient, Clean and Large room

sample_comments.title: Convenient location, friendly staff, comfy room
sample_comments.text:
On the improve side:
Internet was rather slow and on occasion would drop out or fail to connect. In a two person room, two comfy chairs would be nice. If you want a nice pool this isnt your place but who cares the beach is great.

On the good side: Beach service excellent, room always clean, staff great and enough english to have a conversation, location great, breakfast excellent and enough to keep a vegetarian happy. Overall happy with our stay.
sample_comments.positives: Staff are great, speak reasnable english, breakfast and gym good, room comfy with nice ocean view

sample_comments.title: Worry free and convenient
sample_comments.positives: Location, staff, value for money

sample_comments.title: very very good hotel superb views
sample_comments.text: we thourely enjoyed our stay at novotel and would certanly return there again given the chance
sample_comments.positives: exelant views of the sea lovely food and very good staff

sample_comments.title: lovely hotel with great location
sample_comments.text:
there is private beach opposite to the hotel. if you prefer a clean, blue , nice sand beach then you should choose hotel in the islands ( which are very nice).
hotel has nice room, clean and very good service. nite time would be fun as lots of hotels , clubs, coffee around. private beach with lots of activities
sample_comments.positives: nice and clean room

sample_comments.title: Lovely staff, great location, pop w.groups
sample_comments.text:
Pls read to the end. We arrived in the evening at the airport and though we pre-booked a car there wasn't anyone to pick us up. We called the hotel and the admitted to their mistake and asked us to get in to a taxi and they pay the fee. We thought that that would be our compensation and that's it. 
In our room was a lovely fruit bowl w. a card to congratulate us on our anniversary. The room was large nicely decorated comfortable bed and clean w. a side view of the ocean. 
The following morning at breakfast the Front office manager came apologised and offered us a dinner or spa treatment for 2. Our stay at this hotel was very good! The staff was very pleasant and professional going beyond our expectation which are not low. 
The only thing we found irritating is the beach beds situation. The hotel has limited beds and groups of a certain nationality come around 7am everyday and hog them rotating shifts going for breakfast and other meals so other guests have to ether pay or sit on the sand. Not the hotel fault as such but still... 
Other hotel notes- Breakfast could be improved and concierge service wasn't helpfull or knoledgeble, we asked about bicycle rent and the girl told us to look around in the street. ??? 
Though the hotel is clean some soft furnishing upgrades are required. 
We highly recommend this hotel!
sample_comments.positives: Great service

sample_comments.title: Great location and view of beach
sample_comments.text: Hotel is great and rooms were clean n roomy. Only thing I didn't like was the Internet. Somehow, the Internet in the lobby was blazing fast but in the rooms it's terrible. My other traveler reported the same thing. If this hotel had fast Internet in the room I give this a top notch hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful Large rooms w balcony. Great selection of food at breakfast

sample_comments.title: Good location, great balcony facing the sea.
sample_comments.text:
The Novotel is located in the southern side along the seashore in Nha Trang, very close the the tourist ghetto. I usually dislike such ghettos, but in Nha Trang, you will find this little ghetto provides lot of restaurant, coffee, sightseeing, and hotels. If you book into Sheraton on the northern side of the seashore, it is more upmarket, but the surrounding area is quite dead. But in a few years, there will be lot of new things there too.

Novotel provides large rooms with seaview, and a lovely balcony for sitting reading. I enjoyed tremendously sitting on the balcony. The toilet is large with both a bath and shower. But the shower drainage is not working properly, so you will likely to get wet on the floor. The water pressure can be low some time. But in general the water temperature is stable. The room is well maintained, but one night I felt some toilet odor coming out of the AD fan. I changed the fan speed and never noticed the odor again. The beds are very comfortable. And the AC does not blow cold air onto the bed, reducing the chance of getting a cold. The wifi is not strong in the room, that is really a pity. But they do provide a internet cable for laptop connection. We were upgraded to a deluxe room with balcony windows facing two sides, which was truly gorgeous. Living on high floor, there is no problem with mosquitoes. The best time for visiting Nha Trang is March, so when we were there in Christmas New Year period, it was still rain season, windy cloudy. The sea was not good for swimming. But March is warmer calmer.
sample_comments.positives: Location, room, spa

sample_comments.title: I had to wait more than 30 minutes to check in.
sample_comments.text: I had great holiday in Novotel. I book 1 kingsize bed but it was 2 single bed put together so it was not comfortable for 2 people. Anyway, I will come back Novotel again because staffs were helpful and hotel was clean.
sample_comments.positives: Clean, helpful staff.

sample_comments.title: Good Hotel
sample_comments.text:
Reception is nice. We asked the reception for the travel information and they were very detailed and gave very good recommendations.
Room is spacious with balcony, even not seaview room but still can see the sea and the beach. Not the best but good enough.
The design of the toilet in some room is too open, no privacy.
Breakfast buffet is very delicious and large variety.
The drinks in the lobby lounge are good, too. Most of the time offer special offer, buy one get one free or buy two get 1 free... etc.
sample_comments.positives: Good View and Location, Helpful Staff

sample_comments.title: Great views!
sample_comments.text: Great rooms well designed and comfortable beds. The sea view is amazing. Breakfast has an excellent selection. The spa was great and with the promotion the price was very reasonable. Felt a little annoyed that rooms not ready at 3 pm but was ok.
sample_comments.positives: Very nice rooms

sample_comments.title: beatiful and convenience location, love the view
sample_comments.text: Great food good prices excellence staffs , will stay again o r recommended to friends.
sample_comments.positives: Great buffet Breakfast

sample_comments.title: Awesome
sample_comments.text: We stayed at the Novotel for 4 nights. It was awesome, exceeding all our expectations. Go next door and have a coffee cocktail at the paramount they are so good
sample_comments.positives: Best view of the strip,nice big shower,comfy comfy bed,pleasant staff and great location

sample_comments.title: Great hotel, great view, great location
sample_comments.text:
The hotel was great, the location was central to everything. The staff spoke excellent English and were very helpfull.
The beach is just across the road and was delightful. The breakfast was truely amazing with a great choice of local foods.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is well located, close to everything.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel with good service
sample_comments.text: I had a very pleasant stay at Novotel. The price was very reasonable for the room and the view from my balcony was breathtaking. The service was extremely good and the staff always went out of their way to help. The only negative aspect to this hotel was the pool could have been bigger, otherwise I would have no qualms recommending this place to the solo, family or business traveller.
sample_comments.positives: View was awesome and service was great

sample_comments.title: Cozy room with beautiful sea view
sample_comments.text: we had a wonderful trip in nha trang which is partly thanks to the hotel. i felt at ease in comfortable room with warm lights by night & full of sunshine by day and the room seemed to be broaden by special glass-bathroom. we were up-graded to sea-view room with just one night's upgrading fee. staffs were friendly & helpful. we enjoyed our trip so much and will definitely come back.
sample_comments.positives: Near the beach

sample_comments.title: great location for a chain brand hotel
sample_comments.text: nice rooms as you would expect from novotel brand , great position for any activities in nha trang
sample_comments.positives: close to beach and all the nightlife

sample_comments.title: great hotel on great location
sample_comments.text:
stayed in this hotel already several times, and still think this is a great hotel with good price / value performance.
Rooms are well equipped, luxurious, and the bathroom has a large shower area with modern design.
Breakfast buffet is great, not often u can find this type of breakfast in Vietnam, very suitable for international travellers! 
negative point is the small pool on the third floor - not really nice
sample_comments.positives: close to the beach

sample_comments.title: Huge room with great view of the coast
sample_comments.text: Really enjoyed sitting on the balcony overlooking the coast and beach road
sample_comments.positives: modern coastal hotel

sample_comments.title: Fabulous views
sample_comments.text: This is a very modern well appointed hotel. I found the reception staff a little stiff and unwelcoming when we first arrived and they only seemed interested in convincing us to upgrade. All further interactions were much warmer. The area where this hotel is situated is very unvietnamese it is like stepping out in the gold coast.
sample_comments.positives: Balcony overlooking beach and ocean

sample_comments.title: great hotel
sample_comments.text:
Great hotel, right on the beach - just cross the road. Rooms are very nice and stylish, with well equipped bathroom... and a splended view over the Nha Trang bay. Breakfast is over average in Vietnam - large choice (is 4 star hotel, from international chain)
negative points - swimming pool is small, not worthed, but the beach is close by. Sauna has moved into the spa area, not accessible anymore,
sample_comments.positives: location on the beach

sample_comments.title: Nice and clean. Good location. Service is ok.
sample_comments.text: given this is an international hotel chain, we were expecting and hoping the standard to be at least close to others we've stayed in. we were pleasantly surprised and the whole family loved our stay, so much so we stayed an extra night. the service was so so but overall it was a nice stay.
sample_comments.positives: clean rooms with beautiful ocean & city views. great breakfasts

sample_comments.title: convenience, good service, large room
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel to stay, esp. when you are looking for sth convenience. Up to standard service and large hotel room and spacious bathroom.
sample_comments.positives: close to the beach, fabulous balcony view

sample_comments.title: great staff and service
sample_comments.text: nice room with a fantastic view of the ocean. the staff was very attentative.
sample_comments.positives: beautiful room

sample_comments.title: Excellent hotel in superb location
sample_comments.text:
This was my second stay at the hotel.

As previously I was impressed by the high standards throughout.

The staff were efficient and helpful and the rooms large and comfortable.I was particularly impressed by the modern shower.

The location was excellent, being right by the beach.

I really enjoyed my stay and consider it very good value for money.
sample_comments.positives: Location very near beach. Large comfortable room

sample_comments.title: Novotel, reliable hotel with helpful staff
sample_comments.text: I have enjoyed my stays at the Novotel because it reliably delivers high quality service. The hotel is clean, the staff are friend and the location is great.
sample_comments.positives: Rooms, location, service

sample_comments.title: Clean & modern
sample_comments.text: it is unbelievable to me in day and age of awareness and laws about cigarette smoking. not only the stench that permiates everything, but the sound of smokers wretching lung-fulls of tar while we are trying to enjoy a meal is just aweful. i'm sorry for thoz addicted, but isn't it reasonable to expect hotel to protect others from second-hand smoke?
sample_comments.positives: the internet actually worked well, and the linen didn't stink from perfumed detergent
sample_comments.negatives: Pool was too cold to use. Smokers stunk up any public areas.

sample_comments.title: New and stylish
sample_comments.text:
This is probably the best business hotel you can find in Nha Trang. If you're here for business instead of leisure, Novotel is no doubt the best choice.

The location is good, only a short walk to the small night market, where you can find some food and souvenirs to buy. The view is great, you can see the beach at your balcony.

When checking out, numerous people were congested at the front desk, trying to leave soon and catch the very early flight. However, the staff were unable to speed up the process. Each customer took about 10 minutes to check out. Chaotic.
sample_comments.positives: View
sample_comments.negatives: Checking out is a chaos

sample_comments.title: Good location, pricey but really nice.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located close enough to walk to everything but just outside so it's quiet. The views from the front rooms are great (I'm not sure if they have rear rooms). The rooms are clean, comfartable and large. The shower is great, you have to see it. We felt it was expensive but seeing some of the othrs around nha trang it was worth it. We didn't gt breakfast included, there is a great place 100 yards out of the hotel on the right that's cheap and good for food.
The apple macs provide the Internet service free of charge in the lobby as well as free wifi, but no wifi inthe rooms. Downside was the pool, it looks like it would never be in the sun, but as it rained when we where there that wasn't an issue. The hotel also has it's own stretch of beach over the road.
sample_comments.positives: Views from the balcony, the shower, cleanliness of the rooms, Spa treatments.
sample_comments.negatives: Cost, lobby bar cost.

sample_comments.title: convenient and confortable
sample_comments.text:
At first we could say that we enjoyed this hotel.
This hotel is really good location and has nice view from each rooms. 
(same as another reviews, the front desk offered upgrade room, but we stayed a standard room coz we satisfied it)

Additional charged breakfast was so tasty. We liked their Pho. It's quite pricy in Vietnam, tho.

The staff was really helpful.
We could go to good spa and restaurant which the staff suggested us. 

The bath was super clean, but it limited hot water unfortunately.
When we took shower continuously, the water was cold at last.
sample_comments.positives: location, comfortable room, breakfast
sample_comments.negatives: bathroom, chilly outside pool

sample_comments.title: novotel nha trang
sample_comments.text: The service and room were excellent. The views were fantastic, however ther was a nice sunken bath in the room with not enough hot water to fill it, also the shower ran cold after a few minutes which was very disappointing. Also this was a problem with two people wanting to have two consecutive showers so the plumbing needs attending to.
sample_comments.positives: nice views and room
sample_comments.negatives: not enough hot water in the tank to fill the bath

sample_comments.title: Novoytel Nha Trang
sample_comments.text: I had a very enjoyable stay at the Novotel in Nha Trang recently. The hotel is is very clean, comfortable and very good customer service. The only down side to the hotel is that it is not very attractive from the outside, but inside is eveything one would expect from a 4/5 star hotel. The rooms are lovely and big with great views of the beach and the added extras like good pool, gym and spa and very welcome.
sample_comments.positives: Pool, restaurant, room, view from room of beach, customer service, free internet, gym, spa
sample_comments.negatives: hotel design from outside, room service

sample_comments.title: Novotel Nha Trang
sample_comments.text: good value for money ,well situated on the main road across from the beach giving excellent views of the sea.very clean and nice rooms with lots of space. Nice gym and small swimming pool.Didnt have breakfast as £11 bit much when we got all we needed at a local cafe for $3 each.Would stay there again.
sample_comments.positives: Good value hotel with sea views excellent buffet for $16. v helpfull staff. Bar staff speak good English and were very helpfull.
sample_comments.negatives: Noisey guests in the restraunt and some kids running around jumping on chairs but the staff dint say anything not nice when you are trying to enjoy your meal.

sample_comments.title: Expensive but satisfied...
sample_comments.text:
All rooms with beach front view, in room free Wifi access, spacious and beautifully decorated. The beach is just across the street and within walking distance to major hotels, bars and clubs.
Lunch & Dinner buffet is fairly good but little pricey and service is slow. Wish that the swimming pool could be much bigger. Nice lounge area to relax. Front desk service quite efficient.
sample_comments.positives: New, modern, beach front view.
sample_comments.negatives: swimming pool is too small!

sample_comments.title: good hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located just near the sea and every room has ocean view. The room has a nice interior design. Free wireless interent service. The staffs were well trained. Yet the only thing I did not like was there was no bathtub in the room, which I had not expected. But in general I was quite sateisfied with the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: the best location, nice sea view, good staff service
sample_comments.negatives: need bathtub

sample_comments.title: Nice new hotel
sample_comments.text: We got a standard room with view. Room's size was ok, layout was nice. Staff was very nice, especially the porters, very attentive. Breakfast and dinner were ok, reasonable price. Bar drinks were not so good. I ordered a margarita and didn't taste much of the alcohol. Overall it's a nice hotel. I will stay there again if I will get the package deal, if not, there are better hotel with better value.
sample_comments.positives: Everything is new, clean. Staff is nice, tried hard to please guests. Room's layout is nice, good view.
sample_comments.negatives: Pool is small. Spa offers no full body massage.

sample_comments.title: Novotel Nha Trang
sample_comments.text: The hotel frontage is not big and clear enough to attract the tourists but the room is fantastic with modern design, with LCD screen, nice and big bathroom. We think it will have more value if there are more food for the Breakfast to attract the tourist. When booking, somehow our booking did not include the breakfast, we have to pay for but we don't think its worth the value yet. Other than that staff are friendly, helpful.
sample_comments.positives: Modern design room, clean and sea view, very comfortable stay.
sample_comments.negatives: A few steps before entering the room which can be dangerous and we all missed the steps! I wonder who design these steps should think about the safety. I requested the reception to put the sign to remind the steps but I don't think it is enough to prevent the incident, please reconsider and improve this important issue.

sample_comments.title: Utility services that meet the needs
sample_comments.text: Convenient location, good service quality according to the standards advertised by the hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quyen,
Cảm ơn quý khách đã chia sẻ đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất trân trọng sự tin tưởng và hài lòng của quý khách đối với dịch vụ và chất lượng tại khách sạn. Sự thoải mái và tiện ích luôn là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi, và phản hồi tích cực của quý khách là nguồn động lực lớn để tiếp tục nâng cao trải nghiệm cho khách hàng. Rất mong sẽ được đón tiếp quý khách trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo.
Trân trọng,
Bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: All good

sample_comments.title: The pros and cons are clear.
sample_comments.text: On the first day, due to a flight delay, we checked in late at 4 AM. However, the assigned room was damp, and the bathroom door was broken and wouldn't open. In the afternoon, we were assigned to a different floor, and we stayed for two more days. On the last day of check-out, the hairdryer was broken and didn't work. The advantages are that it is located in front of Nha Trang Beach and the kindness of the staff. However, the disadvantages are the aging facilities and the locally inspired food. I went with my parents, and there wasn't much to eat for breakfast, so they only had salad, braised short ribs, and rice. The bathroom was large, like a bathhouse, but it didn't particularly stand out as a benefit, and I don't think it's good in terms of value for money.
sample_comments.response:

Guest service team

Older , well maintained hotel. Super central location but rather quiet, not overwhelmed by tour groups.
Good breafast. Competent front desk.

sample_comments.title: Ks has a nice location.
sample_comments.text: The hotel has a beautiful location and enthusiastic, attentive staff. However, the breakfast is not diverse and the menu does not change on different days. The staff in the dining area are not attentive and the cleaning is slow, so the tables used by previous guests are not cleared. Guests arriving later have no place to sit and must sit at tables that have already been used, with dirty dishes not cleaned up, which is very inconvenient.
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi chị Hạnh,

\Cảm ơn Chị đã dành thời gian cho bản tham khảo ý kiến khách hàng của khách sạn Novotel Nha trang. Mọi ý kiến phản hồi tích cực đều mang lại niềm vui cho chúng tôi.
 
Tôi sẽ chia sẻ ý kiến đóng góp của Chị với đội ngũ nhân viên của mình. Tôi chắc chắn rằng ý kiến phản hồi này sẽ là nguồn động viên khích lệ đối với toàn bộ tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi bởi chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng nâng cấp chất lượng các dịch vụ của mình.

Cảm ơn Chị một lần nữa đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của Chị và chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ lại được gặp, phục vụ Chị cùng gia đình và bạn bè tại Novotel Nha trang lần sau.
Trân trọng,
Guest service team,
